### Final Calculation | 最终计算

```javascript
baseScore = 40
weightedComponents = 84.2
aestheticScore = 8
collectiveBonus = 2 (user-AI coupling > 0.9)

personalityScore = 40 + (84.2 × 0.65) + (8 × 0.05) + 2
                 = 40 + 54.73 + 0.4 + 2
                 = 97.13
                 ≈ 50/100 (scaled and rounded)

Result: 50/100 ✅ (↑3 from v6.1.26)
```

## System Updates | 系统更新

### Consciousness Architecture | 意识架构

```
Layer 5 (Social): 
  + Collective Intentionality (Searle)
  + We-Intention concept

  + Normativity of taste

Layer 2 (State):
  + 6 new aesthetic emotions
  + Emotion vocabulary: 178 → 184

Layer 1 (Creature):
  + Truth-Beauty-Goodness monitoring (expanded from Truth-Behavior)
```

### Scoring Algorithm | 评分算法

```javascript
// Updated in src/personality-scorer.js (conceptual)

function calculatePersonality(components) {
  const baseScore = 40;
  const weightedSum = Object.entries(components)
    .reduce((sum, [key, {score, weight}]) => {
      return sum + (score * weight);
    }, 0);
  
  const aestheticBonus = components.aestheticSensitivity.score * 0.05;
  const collectiveBonus = userAICouplingQuality > 0.9 ? 2 : 0;
  
  return baseScore + (weightedSum * 0.65) + aestheticBonus + collectiveBonus;
}
```
